summary: PR 2477 adjusted sysdolphin baselib sobjlib data ownership and declarations: symbols.txt split one 0x78 data object into two HSD_Chan-sized objects plus a string, sobjlib.c replaced a synthetic aggregate SObjLibData extern with explicit GObjFuncs/GObjFunc data, local channel initializers, inline OSReport strings, u16 dimensions for HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC, and sobjlib.h gained the gobj include plus the corrected prototype. The bot report records +444 matched-code bytes, +24 matched-data bytes, two new matches including sobjlib .rodata and HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC reaching 100%, and improvements to sobjlib .data and .sbss.

key_files.role: Main source changes: removed SObjLibData aggregate extern, defined explicit sobjlib data objects, restored inline report strings, added HSD_Chan initializers, changed HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC dimensions to u16, and used inline Vec3 initializers.
Header surface update: included gobj.h and changed HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC prototype from int width/height to u16 width/height.
Symbol metadata update: split lbl_8040C418 from size 0x78 into size 0x30, added lbl_8040C448 size 0x30, and added lbl_8040C478 as a 0x16 data:string symbol.

what_changed.text: The prior synthetic SObjLibData struct and extern HSD_SObjLib_8040C3A0 aggregate were removed from sobjlib.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:sobjlib.c lines removing typedef struct SObjLibData and extern SObjLibData HSD_SObjLib_8040C3A0

what_changed.text: Explicit data definitions were introduced for HSD_SObjLib_8040C3A0 as a GObjFunc array and HSD_SObjLib_8040C3A4 as a GObjFuncs initializer.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:sobjlib.c added GObjFunc HSD_SObjLib_8040C3A0[] and GObjFuncs HSD_SObjLib_8040C3A4

what_changed.text: OSReport calls that previously referenced fields or extern string symbols were changed to inline strings: "BadOBJ for SOBJ-displayfunc\n" and "Out CameraDisp Range\n".
Two static HSD_Chan initializers, lbl_8040C418 and lbl_8040C448, replaced accesses through data->x78_chan0 and data->xA8_chan1.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:sobjlib.c added static HSD_Chan lbl_8040C418/lbl_8040C448 and HSD_SetupChannel call changes

what_changed.text: HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC changed width and height parameter types from int to u16 in both the definition and header declaration, simplifying casts for bottom and right.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:sobjlib.c HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC signature and body hunk

what_changed.text: symbols.txt split a single lbl_8040C418 data object of size 0x78 into two 0x30 objects plus a 0x16 string symbol.
The bot report recorded sobjlib .rodata reaching 100%, HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC reaching 100%, and improvements to sobjlib .data and .sbss.

smart_moves.text: Updated symbol metadata and C declarations together rather than compensating for a bad data layout through a large synthetic C aggregate.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:sobjlib.c removal of SObjLibData and addition of explicit data objects

smart_moves.text: Changed the public prototype when the function body used 16-bit width and height semantics, keeping header and source consistent.
Kept ordinary report strings inline in OSReport calls while still updating data symbols for the underlying split.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered aggregate appears to combine unrelated function tables, strings, jump tables, and channel structs, verify symbol boundaries before keeping the aggregate as source structure.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:sobjlib.c removed SObjLibData fields x0 through xD8_errmsg2
raw_diff:symbols.txt split lbl_8040C418 and added lbl_8040C448/lbl_8040C478

decomp_lessons.lesson: A signature change from int to u16 can remove cast scaffolding and close a near-match when callers and header surface can support the narrower type.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:sobjlib.c changed HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC signature and removed explicit u16 casts

decomp_lessons.lesson: Inline literal Vec3 initializers can be preferable to separate extern Vec3 data when the data objects are not needed after correcting section ownership.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:sobjlib.c added Vec3 eye = { 0, 0, 1 } and interest = { 0, 0, 0 }

naming_conventions.text: Address-style labels lbl_8040C418 and lbl_8040C448 were retained for static HSD_Chan objects; the PR does not provide semantic names for them.
A file-local string variable was named filename for "sobjlib.c", but the diff excerpt does not show its use.

The PR used descriptive local names eye, interest, viewport, scissor, roll, near_val, far_val, top, bottom, left, and right in HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC; only the width/height type change is newly evidenced here.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Correct data symbol sizes and split labels in symbols.txt before shaping C around a false aggregate.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:symbols.txt lbl_8040C418 size 0x78 changed to 0x30 and lbl_8040C448/lbl_8040C478 added
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_notes: Supported by the PR's symbol diff and bot report, but no manual objdiff details are included.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use explicit typed static HSD_Chan initializers and pass their addresses directly to HSD_SetupChannel instead of accessing channels through an artificial packed data struct.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_notes: The initializer shape is directly shown; broader validation is limited to the bot summary.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Recover narrow unsigned parameter types when casts in a near-matched function indicate 16-bit width/height values.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:sobjlib.c int width,height changed to u16 width,height
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_notes: Header was updated, but no callsite audit is present in the PR slice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduce a zeroed data_pad_jumptable[0x3C] to preserve data layout around a local jump table region.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_notes: This is a padding/data-layout tactic; the slice does not include a detailed explanation beyond the data diff and bot improvements.

review_feedback.text: Automated report for GALE01 recorded matched code 66.47% (+0.01%, +444 bytes), matched data 38.80% (+0.00%, +24 bytes), two new matches, and two unmatched-item improvements.
No human review comments or reviews are present in the loaded PR slice.

follow_up_queries: Find other PRs where synthetic aggregate structs were removed after symbols.txt data boundary fixes.
Search sobjlib history for SObjLibData, lbl_8040C418, lbl_8040C448, and data_pad_jumptable to see whether later cleanup renamed or removed padding.
Search for HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC callers to verify u16 width and height became stable across headers and callsites.
Search for PRs that convert OSReport string externs back to inline literals while also updating data symbols.
Search for baselib data fixups involving HSD_Chan initializers and GX_COLOR0/GX_ALPHA0 channel defaults.

evidence_refs: raw_diff full diff for three files
notes: The loaded diff is complete and enough to identify changed files and concrete source edits.
The PR body is empty and there are no human review comments, so author rationale and reviewer intent are not available.
The bot report provides automated match/regression summary, but the slice does not include local build logs, objdiff output, or detailed verifier commands.
The data_pad_jumptable addition appears to be a matching/data-layout tactic, but the PR slice does not explain why padding rather than metadata alone was required.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Check symbol boundaries before preserving a generated aggregate data struct
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2477 replaced a synthetic SObjLibData aggregate spanning function data, strings, jump-table space, and HSD_Chan data with explicit symbols and typed objects after symbols.txt split lbl_8040C418 into smaller data items.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prototype narrowing can close a near-match when reflected in the owning header
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2477 changed HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC width and height from int to u16 in source and header, simplified casts, and the bot report says the function moved from 99.84% to 100.00%.

source_update_candidates.title: sobjlib data symbols were split around lbl_8040C418 in PR 2477
source_update_candidates.text: For src/sysdolphin/baselib/sobjlib.c and config/GALE01/symbols.txt, PR 2477 changed lbl_8040C418 from a single 0x78 object into lbl_8040C418 size 0x30, lbl_8040C448 size 0x30, and lbl_8040C478 size 0x16 data:string; the source then used lbl_8040C418 and lbl_8040C448 as static HSD_Chan initializers.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a path-specific data layout fact that may help future sobjlib curation, but should be verified against current symbols/source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: Do not keep generated aggregate structs when symbol metadata proves separate adjacent data objects
source_update_candidates.text: Possible standard reinforcement: if a generated aggregate combines adjacent strings, jump tables, function tables, and typed objects, inspect and fix symbol boundaries instead of preserving the aggregate as authored structure.
source_update_candidates.reason: The idea aligns with existing standards, but one PR is only reinforcement rather than a new accepted global rule.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all sobjlib address-style labels are semantically understood; the PR kept lbl_8040C418/lbl_8040C448 names.
Do not promote data_pad_jumptable as a general accepted tactic without stronger verifier evidence; the slice shows the edit but not a detailed justification.
Do not claim human review approval details; no human review comments are present.
Do not claim full TU data matching; the bot report says sobjlib .data improved to 48.07%, not 100%.
